name: Balsamic Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 Creole or Beefsteak tomatoes, sliced 1/4-inch thick
2 cups sliced assorted wild mushrooms (chantrelles, shiitaki)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Season the vegetables with 2 tablespoons of olive oil and salt and pepper.
3. Place all the vegetables on the grill (except for the mushrooms) and grill for 2 minutes on each side.
4. In a mixing bowl, whisk together the olive oil, vinegar, shallots, garlic paste, and basil. Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Remove the grilled vegetables from the heat.
6. Alternate layering the different vegetables in a glass souffle bowl or serving platter.
7. Pour the marinade over the vegetables.
8. Allow the marinated vegetables to sit for 12 hours or overnight, covered.
9. Serve the vegetables in the glass container or on a platter.
10. Garnish with parsley.
Yield: 6 servings
